name: Tee Higgins
headline: Elite efficiency, touchdown machine, locked-in WR1 ceiling
body:
Higgins keeps producing like a top-tier wideout on a complementary target diet. In 2025 he posted 0.356 EPA per play and a 54.1% success rate across just 15 games, turning 98 targets and a 16.1% target share into 846 yards and 11 touchdowns. The volume sits behind Ja'Marr Chase, but the efficiency is loud: 1.65 yards per route, 27.9% air-yards share, and 15 red-zone looks that fuel his scoring. He drops almost nothing, with two on the year and a 2% drop rate.

The 2024 line is the dream upside, when 0.526 EPA per play and a 63.3% success rate carried 73 catches in 12 games. As a high-end WR2 with WR1 weeks when Burrow is upright, he's a clean Round 3-4 anchor. The one flag is leaning on touchdowns to mask a modest route-run usage rate; any bump in target share unlocks a real bargain.
